text: my boss just said 'lets circle back' for the 4th time today i am going to lose it
accidentally liked my ex's photo from 2019 at 3am. time to fake my own death
rent went up again lol cool cool cool guess ill just photosynthesize for dinner
hot take: cereal is soup and i will die on this hill
my wifi dropped during a job interview and honestly it was the best possible outcome
i put oat milk in my coffee once and my whole personality changed apparently
told myself id go to the gym today. opened the fridge instead. same energy right
excel crashed and took my will to live with it
what if birds are just government drones that got really good at improv
my landlord texted me 'we need to talk' and i almost threw up
been on 3 dates this month and all of them mentioned crypto within 10 minutes
pizza is a breakfast food and anyone who disagrees is lying to themselves
my coworker heats fish in the microwave every single day. every. single. day.
i mass applied to 47 jobs last night while eating cereal over the sink
showerthought: dogs dont know theyre dogs. wild
the economy is just vibes at this point honestly
my plant died and i took it personally
bluetooth should work by now its 2026 why is everything still terrible
i said 'you too' when the waiter said enjoy your meal and i havent recovered
whoever invented open plan offices deserves jail time
my bank account said insufficient funds. yeah no kidding
matched with someone on hinge and they unmatched before i could even say hi
ketchup on eggs is valid and im tired of pretending otherwise
spent 2 hours debugging only to find a missing semicolon. i am the problem
geopolitics is just group projects but with nukes
i meal prepped on sunday and ate it all by tuesday. growth
my cat stares at me like she knows every bad decision ive ever made
just realized ive been on autopilot since like 2022
cold brew is just bean water for people who think theyre better than you
i have 847 unread emails and at this point theyre someone elses problem
went to therapy and my therapist sighed. thats how u know its bad
if one more person tells me to learn to code i swear
my uber driver played his podcast out loud the whole ride. no escape
carbonara doesnt have cream in it and this is the hill i choose
standing desk hasnt fixed my posture but it did fix my knees. they hurt now too
world leaders tweeting at each other like its a group chat is so unhinged
i told my date i love hiking. i have never hiked. not once
my coworker cc's our manager on everything including lunch orders
avocado toast didnt bankrupt me but my student loans sure did
alexa played the wrong song and i yelled at her like she was a person
just got ghosted by someone i wasnt even that into and im still offended
bone broth is just stock with a marketing team
i run but only when im late. does that count as cardio
my roommate leaves passive aggressive sticky notes everywhere. im losing it
every meeting could have been an email and every email could have been nothing
put sriracha on everything and call it cooking. gordon ramsay could never
my vpn disconnected mid zoom and everyone saw i was in bed
UN meetings are basically the worlds worst book club
i downloaded a budgeting app and it just made me more aware of my suffering
tinder bio said 'love to laugh' what does that even mean. who doesnt
pineapple on pizza is fine but raisins in cookies is a crime against humanity
my fitbit congratulated me for walking to the fridge 12 times
the printer at work has a personal vendetta against me specifically
showerthought: the ocean is just soup we havent seasoned yet
tried intermittent fasting but i just get mean when im hungry
every country's problems could be solved by better public transit. thats it
i have commitment issues but somehow signed a 12 month lease
my phone battery dies faster than my motivation on mondays
cooked a nice dinner for myself then ate it standing over the sink anyway
linkedin influencers are just motivational posters that learned to type
went on a run and my knees filed a formal complaint
dating apps should have a filter for people who actually text back
mayo is just egg lotion and you cant convince me otherwise
my code works but i have no idea why and im too scared to touch it
the UN should just settle things with a mario kart tournament honestly
told my gym buddy id be there at 6am. its 11am and im still in bed
my credit score went up 2 points and i almost threw a party
got a match on bumble. she opened with 'hey'. riveting stuff
ranch dressing is america's greatest contribution to civilization and i mean it
windows update chose violence at 2pm on a wednesday
sometimes i think about how ants dont pay rent and i get jealous
my coworker says 'lets take this offline' in person. offline from WHAT
been saying 'im going to start saving' since 2018
went on a date and she spent 40 minutes talking about her crystals
a hot dog is a taco. the geometry checks out. fight me
my monitor has more screen time than i have will power
nato meetings are just potlucks where nobody brings anything good
i did one pushup and told everyone at work about it
my savings account is just my checking account's sadder twin
she said she wanted space so i sent her a nasa article
instant ramen is a perfectly valid dinner when you add an egg. its gourmet then
tried to fix my own wifi and now nothing in my house works
every country blaming each other while the planet burns is peak group project
leg day was 3 days ago and i still cant use stairs normally
my paycheck hits different when rent takes 60% of it immediately
third date and he brought his mom. there was no fourth date
butter chicken is the greatest food ever created and this is objective fact
siri hasnt understood me correctly even once in 2026. impressive consistency
we live in a simulation but whoever coded it definitely used php
i stretch once and act like i completed an entire yoga retreat
my overdraft fee costs more than what i overdrafted. make it make sense
he said he was 6 foot on his profile. he was not 6 foot
cheese is just milk that got its life together honestly
slack notifications are just adult homework alerts
peace treaties should require both leaders to share a meal first. just saying
signed up for a 5k and immediately regretted every choice that led me here
my bank app sends me low balance alerts like i dont already know
went on a coffee date that lasted 11 minutes. new personal worst
